languages.text: {n}Эоганн недовольно цыкает, задумчиво подкручивая пистон на бороде.{/n} "Объект эксперимента слишком рано покинул Сектор Бионика. Нунциус прав, я был так поглощен процессом триасомии и его успешным результатом, что допустил ошибку, разомкнув крепления до проведения умственной эвалюации. Вольный Торговец, нам нужно стабилизировать состояние Триасоматы, прежде чем образец будет утерян навсегда".

{n}Eogunn clucks his tongue in displeasure, worrying at a piston on his beard as he thinks.{/n} "The subject left the Sector Bionica prematurely. Nuncius is right, I was so absorbed in the triasomia procedure and its successful outcome that I made the mistake of unfastening the restraints before the psychological evaluation could be conducted. Rogue Trader, we must stabilise the Triasomata before the specimen is forever lost to us."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн недовольно цыкает, задумчиво подкручивая пистон на бороде.{/n} "Объект эксперимента слишком рано покинул Сектор Бионика. languages.text: {n}エオガンは不快そうに舌を打ち、顎の髭をなでながら考え込む。{/n} 「対象はセクター・ビオニカを早々に離脱した。ヌンシウスは正しい、私はトライアスオミアの手順と成功に夢中になり、心理評価が行われる前に拘束を解いたという過ちを犯した。ローグ・トレーダー、標本が我々から永遠に失われる前に、トライアスオマタを安定させる必要がある」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn clucks his tongue in displeasure, worrying at a piston on his beard as he thinks.{/n} "The subject left the Sector Bionica prematurely. Nuncius is right, I was so absorbed in the triasomia procedure and its successful outcome that I made the mistake of unfastening the restraints before the psychological evaluation could be conducted. Rogue Trader, we must stabilise the Triasomata before the specimen is forever lost to us."

traits.locale_text: エオグンは不快そうに舌を打ち、顎の髭をなでながら考え込む。「対象はセクター・ビオニカを早々に離脱した。ヌンシウスは正しい、私はトライアスオミアの手順と成功に夢中になり、心理評価が行われる前に拘束を解いたという過ちを犯した。ローグ・トレーダー、標本が我々から永遠に失われる前に、トライアスオマタを安定させる必要がある。」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡不悦地咂嘴，思索时忧愁地摩挲着胡须上的一个活塞。{/n}“实验体过早离开了仿生区。努恩修斯说得对，我太专注于三相体融合手术及其初步成功，以至于犯了一个错误——在进行心理评估之前就解开了束缚。行商浪人，我们必须在彻底失去三相体之前，稳定其状况。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn clucks his tongue in displeasure, worrying at a piston on his beard as he thinks.{/n} "The subject left the Sector Bionica prematurely. Nuncius is right, I was so absorbed in the triasomia procedure and its successful outcome that I made the mistake of unfastening the restraints before the psychological evaluation could be conducted. Rogue Trader, we must stabilise the Triasomata before the specimen is forever lost to us."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡不悦地咂嘴，思索时忧愁地摩挲着胡须上的一个活塞。{/n}“实验体过早离开了仿生区。努恩修斯说得对，我太专注于三相体融合手术及其初步成功，以至于犯了一个错误——在进行心理评估之前就解开了束缚。行商浪人，我们必须在彻底失去三相体之前，稳定其状况。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn fait claquer sa langue d'un air mécontent et réfléchit en triturant un piston dans sa barbe.{/n} « Le Triasomata a quitté le secteur Bionica prématurément. Nuncius a raison, j'étais tellement absorbé par la procédure de triasomia et sa réussite que j'ai commis l'erreur de détacher le sujet avant de le soumettre à une évaluation psychologique. {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, nous devons le stabiliser avant de le perdre pour de bon. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn clucks his tongue in displeasure, worrying at a piston on his beard as he thinks.{/n} "The subject left the Sector Bionica prematurely. Nuncius is right, I was so absorbed in the triasomia procedure and its successful outcome that I made the mistake of unfastening the restraints before the psychological evaluation could be conducted. Rogue Trader, we must stabilise the Triasomata before the specimen is forever lost to us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn fait claquer sa langue d'un air mécontent et réfléchit en triturant un piston dans sa barbe.{/n} « Le Triasomata a quitté le secteur Bionica prématurément. Nuncius a raison, j'étais tellement absorbé par la procédure de triasomia et sa réussite que j'ai commis l'erreur de détacher le sujet avant de le soumettre à une évaluation psychologique. {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, nous devons le stabiliser avant de le perdre pour de bon. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn chasca la lengua con desagrado, mesando un pistón de su barba mientras piensa.{/n} «El sujeto abandonó el sector Bionica de forma prematura. Nuncius tiene razón: estaba tan fascinado por el procedimiento de la triasomía y su éxito que cometí el error de aflojar sus ligaduras antes de realizar una evaluación psicológica minuciosa. Comerciante, debemos estabilizar al triasómata antes de que perdamos por completo al espécimen».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn clucks his tongue in displeasure, worrying at a piston on his beard as he thinks.{/n} "The subject left the Sector Bionica prematurely. Nuncius is right, I was so absorbed in the triasomia procedure and its successful outcome that I made the mistake of unfastening the restraints before the psychological evaluation could be conducted. Rogue Trader, we must stabilise the Triasomata before the specimen is forever lost to us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn chasca la lengua con desagrado, mesando un pistón de su barba mientras piensa.{/n} «El sujeto abandonó el sector Bionica de forma prematura. Nuncius tiene razón: estaba tan fascinado por el procedimiento de la triasomía y su éxito que cometí el error de aflojar sus ligaduras antes de realizar una evaluación psicológica minuciosa. Comerciante, debemos estabilizar al triasómata antes de que perdamos por completo al espécimen».

languages.text: {n}Düşünürken sakalındaki bir pistonla oynayan Eogunn, hoşnutsuzlukla dilini şaklatıyor.{/n} "Denek, Sektör Biyonika'dan vaktinden erken ayrıldı. Nuncius haklı, üçyeközleştirme prosedürüne ve başarılı sonucuna o kadar dalmıştım ki psikolojik değerlendirme yapılmadan önce bağları çözme hatasında bulundum. Hür Tacir, numuneyi sonsuza dek kaybetmeden önce Üçyeköz'ü stabilize etmeliyiz."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn clucks his tongue in displeasure, worrying at a piston on his beard as he thinks.{/n} "The subject left the Sector Bionica prematurely. Nuncius is right, I was so absorbed in the triasomia procedure and its successful outcome that I made the mistake of unfastening the restraints before the psychological evaluation could be conducted. Rogue Trader, we must stabilise the Triasomata before the specimen is forever lost to us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Düşünürken sakalındaki bir pistonla oynayan Eogunn, hoşnutsuzlukla dilini şaklatıyor.{/n} "Denek, Sektör Biyonika'dan vaktinden erken ayrıldı. Nuncius haklı, üçyeközleştirme prosedürüne ve başarılı sonucuna o kadar dalmıştım ki psikolojik değerlendirme yapılmadan önce bağları çözme hatasında bulundum. Hür Tacir, numuneyi sonsuza dek kaybetmeden önce Üçyeköz'ü stabilize etmeliyiz."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schnalzt missmutig mit seiner Zunge und spielt nachdenklich mit einem Kolben an seinem Bart.{/n} "Das Subjekt hat den Sektor Bionica vorzeitig verlassen. Nuncius hat recht. Ich war derart in den erfolgreichen Abschluss der Triasomia-Prozedur vertieft, dass mir der Fehler unterlief, die Fixierungen vor der psychologischen Bewertung zu entfernen. {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, wir müssen den Triasomata stabilisieren, ehe wir ihn für immer verlieren."

Nuncius is right, I was so absorbed in the triasomia procedure and its successful outcome that I made the mistake of unfastening the restraints before the psychological evaluation could be conducted. Rogue Trader, we must stabilise the Triasomata before the specimen is forever lost to us."
